info.title: Tinfoil port
info.author: ZappyHB
info.details:
infoil is a powerful and user-friendly content manager designed for Nintendo Switch homebrew environments. It provides a streamlined interface for browsing, installing, and managing content directly from your console, making it easy to keep your library organized and up to date.

With a focus on performance and usability, Tinfoil offers a smooth, controller-friendly experience that integrates seamlessly into your setup. Whether you’re managing locally stored files or connecting to remote sources, Tinfoil simplifies the entire process with fast navigation and reliable installation tools.

Features
Intuitive and responsive user interface
Browse and manage installed content
Install content from local storage or network sources
Queue-based downloads and installations
File browser with advanced management options
Automatic metadata and organization support
Optimized for speed and stability

Tinfoil is built for users who want a flexible and efficient way to manage their content, all from a single app.
